title: AN ACT REQUIRING THAT FILIPINO VETERANS WHO DIE SHALL BE BURIED WITH THEIR CASKETS COVERED WITH THE FILIPINO FLAG.

chunks.text:
H. No. 3770 S. No. 453 / 60 OG No. 45, 7355 (November 9, 1964)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 3934, June 18, 1964 ]

AN ACT REQUIRING THAT FILIPINO VETERANS WHO DIE SHALL BE BURIED WITH THEIR CASKETS COVERED WITH THE FILIPINO FLAG.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. Filipino veterans who die shall be buried with their caskets covered with the Filipino flag which shall be furnished by the Government free.

SEC. 2. To carry into effect the provision of this Act, the sum of fifty thousand pesos is hereby appropriated o of any funds in the National Treasury not otherwise appropriated, for the purchase of flags.

SEC. 3. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved, June 18, 1964.
